statement: In every magma, Equation 2229 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (w * z)`) implies Equation 1098 (`x = y * ((x * (z * y)) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0421
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op w z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x (op z y)) z))
